definitions.description: Split data into batches and iterate over each batch

builderHint.searchHint: Loop pattern: connect splitInBatches → per-item work → back to splitInBatches via `nextBatch(splitInBatches)`. The `done` output fires automatically after all items are processed. Already no-ops on empty input — do NOT add an IF gate before it to check 'has items?'.

extraTypeDefContent.content:
<patterns>
<pattern title="Per-item loop using splitInBatches with nextBatch">
const sibNode = splitInBatches({
  version: 3,
  config: { name: 'Batch Process', parameters: { batchSize: 1 } }
});

export default workflow('id', 'name')
  .add(startTrigger)
  .to(fetchRecords)
  .to(sibNode
    .onDone(finalizeResults)
    .onEachBatch(processRecord.to(nextBatch(sibNode)))
  );
</pattern>
</patterns>

properties.displayName: You may not need this node — n8n nodes automatically run once for each input item. More info
properties.name: splitInBatchesNotice
batchSize
properties.description: The number of items to return with each call

options.name: reset
options.description: Whether the node starts again from the beginning of the input items. This will treat incoming data as a new set rather than continuing with the previous items.
